title: Design By Violet Christmas Gingerbread House Nested Gift Boxes – Set of 3 Sturdy Card Boxes with Lids – Reusable Festive Storage for Presents
features: SET OF 3 NESTED BOXES – Includes three reusable gift boxes in coordinating gingerbread house designs that stack neatly for storage
STRONG 1200GSM CARD – Sturdy construction keeps gifts safe and secure, ideal for clothing, toys, books or multiple smaller presents
FESTIVE DESIGN – Decorated with candy canes, gumdrops, fairy lights and Christmas trees for a fun seasonal look
EASY TO USE – Lidded boxes make wrapping quick and simple – just pop in your gift and close the lid
REUSABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY – A sustainable alternative to single-use wrapping paper that can be enjoyed year after year
description: Add a touch of festive fun to your gift-giving with this set of three Design By Violet Christmas Gingerbread House Nested Gift Boxes. Each box is beautifully illustrated with a colourful gingerbread house design, complete with candy canes, gumdrops, fairy lights and Christmas trees. The set includes three different sizes that stack neatly together for easy storage when not in use. Made from durable 1200GSM card, these boxes are designed to be strong and reusable, making them a practical and eco-friendly alternative to wrapping paper. Perfect for presenting a variety of gifts such as clothing, toys, books, home décor or sweet treats, these boxes make wrapping quick and stress-free – just place your gift inside, pop on the lid, and your present is ready to give. Whether you use them individually for different recipients or stacked together as a decorative display, these gingerbread house boxes bring a cheerful Christmas charm to any celebration.
